**Source:** [Device Tree Specification](https://devicetree-specification.readthedocs.io/)

## interrupt-controller

Property: `interrupt-controller`

Value type: `<empty>`

The presence of an _interrupt-controller_ property defines a node as an interrupt controller node.

---

**Source:** Linux kernel Documentation

```
- interrupt-controller: indicates that this block is an interrupt controller.
```
